story: As a product owner I would like the user to be able to select one product, add it to the cart and checkout

cases.title: Add product to cart
cases.when: User clicks the add button on a product card
cases.then: The cart count increases by 1 and the product is listed in the cart drawer

cases.title: Verify product details in cart
cases.given: A product is added to the cart
cases.then: The product name, quantity, and price are correctly displayed in the cart

cases.title: Checkout with a product in cart
cases.given: A product is added to the cart
cases.then: The order confirmation modal is displayed

cases.title: Dismiss order confirmation
cases.then: The order confirmation modal is closed

cases.title: Add multiple products to cart
cases.when: User clicks add button on multiple product cards
cases.then: The cart count reflects the total number of products added

cases.title: Remove product from cart
cases.given: Multiple products are added to the cart
cases.when: User removes a product from the cart
cases.then: The cart count decreases and the product is no longer listed in the cart drawer

cases.title: Adjust product quantity in cart
cases.given: A product is added to the cart
cases.when: User increases or decreases the product quantity
cases.then: The total price updates accordingly in the cart
